---
title: "Hornbeam (Carpinus betulus)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator instead. -->

**Family:** [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Carpinus*](/trees/genus/carpinus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 59 - Hornbeam](../59.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 60 - Hornbeam](../60.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Tree 61 - Hornbeam](../61.html) | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
